---
name: Bug Report
about: Something isn't working correctly
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
---

## Description
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.12.1]
- mustel version: [e.g. 0.2.0]

## Command Run
```bash
mustel review --pretty
```

## Expected Output
What you expected mustel to return.

## Actual Output
What mustel actually returned (paste the JSON).

## Additional Context
Any other context about the problem.
